name: circleci-yaml-lsp-for-claude
description: Dev tooling and tests for the circleci-yaml-lsp Claude Code plugin. The plugin itself lives in plugins/circleci-yaml-lsp/ and ships no npm dependencies.

scripts.test:ci: mkdir -p test-results && { node --test --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter=junit --test-reporter-destination=test-results/junit.xml test/lib.test.mjs test/proxy.test.mjs; code=$?; node scripts/junit-suite-wrap.mjs test-results/junit.xml; exit $code; }
